## Documentation and Env

- [ ] `Handoff.md` updated if the change affects shared flow
- [ ] `changelog.md` updated if behavior or workflow changed
- [ ] `project_context.md` updated if architecture or deployment assumptions changed
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new variables were introduced
- [ ] No docs or env changes needed
